name: Starter Hero
description: A ready-made example Hoodat character to explore the profile editor.

items.name: Nova Quill
items.description: A wandering cartographer who maps places that move.

data.summary: A wandering cartographer who maps places that move.
data.tagline: Every map is a promise to come back.

appearance.hair_details: cropped short, ink-stained at the tips
distinguishing_features: compass tattoo on her left wrist

outfits.name: Field Kit
outfits.top: weathered canvas jacket over a linen shirt
outfits.accessories: leather satchel of rolled charts; brass compass

fears: being lost somewhere she cannot chart

background.backstory: Raised in a port town where the coastline shifted with the tides, Nova learned early that no map stays true for long.
relationships: an estranged twin who stayed home

speaking_style.description: Plain-spoken and precise, with a surveyor's habit of measuring things in steps and landmarks.
dialogue_examples: Give me a fixed star and a steady hand, and I'll find anywhere twice.

experiences.description: Charted a marsh that drained overnight, proving her oldest map wrong.
Guided a stranded caravan home by the smell of the sea.

qa.question: What do you do when the map is wrong?
qa.answer: I trust my feet over the paper, and then I fix the paper.
